mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the unemployment rate above 7.5% signals a labor market downturn that reduces consumer spending and boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in labor market downturn periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in industrial production above 98 signals a surge in demand for goods and services that boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in demand surge periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in housing starts below 850 signals a supply-side shock that reduces housing market activity and boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in supply-side shock periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the federal funds rate and a 3-month increase in the GDP growth rate above 2.5% signals a monetary-fiscal policy mix that boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in monetary-fiscal policy mix periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the unemployment rate above 7.5% and a 3-month decline in industrial production below 98 signals a labor-market-supply shock that reduces consumer spending and boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in labor-market-supply shock periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the GDP growth rate above 2.5% and a 3-month increase in housing starts above 850 signals a demand-side shock that boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in demand-side shock periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the federal funds rate and a 3-month decline in industrial production below 98 signals a monetary-supply shock that reduces housing market activity and boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in monetary-supply shock periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
